notes: Univariate Cox PH models for EFS: two of the upstream single-covariate PROC PHREG models (CLASS SEX(ref='M') and CLASS bl_wbcc, MODEL EFS_y*EFS_c(0)=covar / rl) kept verbatim. External libraw read replaced by a 30-row synthetic dataset in autoexec with the columns the models read (FASFL, EFS_y, EFS_c, SEX, bl_wbcc). WBC category labels rendered in ASCII; CLASS ref coding, MODEL time*censor(0)=covar form and RL option are upstream-verbatim.
